mapper.select: SELECT kb.id AS kanban_id, kb.kanban_code, kb.status AS kanban_status, kb.board_qty, kb.received_at, o.id AS order_id, o.inbound_no, o.status AS order_status, l.id AS line_id, l.line_no, l.planned_qty, l.received_qty AS line_received_qty, l.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, l.target_warehouse_id, l.target_location_id, sl.warehouse_id AS location_warehouse_id, sl.location_name FROM kanban_board kb JOIN inbound_order o ON o.id = kb.inbound_order_id JOIN inbound_order_line l ON l.id = kb.inbound_order_line_id JOIN material m ON m.id = l.material_id JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.id = l.target_location_id WHERE kb.kanban_code = #{kanbanCode} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, material_id, warehouse_id, storage_location_id, on_hand_qty, updated_at FROM inventory_balance WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND storage_location_id = #{storageLocationId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT m.material_code, m.material_name, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, sl.location_code, sl.location_name, ib.on_hand_qty, ib.updated_at FROM inventory_balance ib JOIN material m ON m.id = ib.material_id JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = ib.warehouse_id JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.id = ib.storage_location_id WHERE (#{materialCode} IS NULL OR m.material_code = #{materialCode}) AND (#{warehouseCode} IS NULL OR w.warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}) AND (#{locationCode} IS NULL OR sl.location_code = #{locationCode}) ORDER BY ib.id ASC

SELECT im.movement_no, m.material_code, m.material_name, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, sl.location_code, sl.location_name, im.qty, kb.kanban_code, io.inbound_no, im.occurred_at FROM inventory_movement im JOIN material m ON m.id = im.material_id JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = im.warehouse_id JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.id = im.storage_location_id LEFT JOIN kanban_board kb ON kb.id = im.kanban_board_id LEFT JOIN inbound_order io ON io.id = kb.inbound_order_id WHERE (#{materialCode} IS NULL OR m.material_code = #{materialCode}) AND (#{warehouseCode} IS NULL OR w.warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}) AND (#{locationCode} IS NULL OR sl.location_code = #{locationCode}) AND (#{inboundNo} IS NULL OR io.inbound_no = #{inboundNo}) AND (#{kanbanCode} IS NULL OR kb.kanban_code = #{kanbanCode}) ORDER BY im.occurred_at DESC, im.id DESC

SELECT kb.kanban_code, kb.status AS kanban_status, io.inbound_no, m.material_code, m.material_name, sl.location_code, sl.location_name, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(kb.received_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'), '') AS scanned_at, COALESCE(im.movement_no, '') AS movement_no FROM kanban_board kb JOIN inbound_order io ON io.id = kb.inbound_order_id JOIN inbound_order_line iol ON iol.id = kb.inbound_order_line_id JOIN material m ON m.id = iol.material_id JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.id = iol.target_location_id LEFT JOIN inventory_movement im ON im.kanban_board_id = kb.id WHERE kb.kanban_code = #{kanbanCode} ORDER BY im.occurred_at DESC, im.id DESC LIMIT 1
